settingsTemplates.defaults.portalLink.co:
Hello {clientName},

Thank you for contacting Ella Tax. Please use the link below to upload your tax documents:

{portalUrl}

Contact us if you have any questions.
settingsTemplates.defaults.scheduleC.con:
Hello {clientName},

We need your business expense information (Schedule C) for tax year {taxYear}. Please use the link below to complete the form:

{expenseUrl}

Contact us if you have any questions.
settingsTemplates.defaults.scheduleE.con:
Hello {clientName},

We need your rental property information (Schedule E) for tax year {taxYear}. Please use the link below to complete the form:

{expenseUrl}

Contact us if you have any questions.
